---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: "Suggest an idea for this project"
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-discussion"]
---

## 🎯 Is Your Feature Related to a Problem?

Describe the problem. Ex. I'm always frustrated when...

## 💡 Describe the Solution You'd Like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🔄 Describe Alternatives You've Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered?

## 👥 Use Case

Who would benefit from this feature? Why is this important?

## 📸 Mockups / Wireframes

If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or examples to illustrate your idea.

## 🏆 Priority

- [ ] Low (nice to have)
- [ ] Medium (should have)
- [ ] High (must have)

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context here.

---

**Checklist:**
- [ ] I've searched existing issues for similar requests
- [ ] This feature aligns with Liora's privacy-first philosophy
- [ ] I've provided clear use cases
- [ ] I can help implement this feature
